basis.founded: 2024 [uncertain] — positioned as recent challenger / Journalytix and Edgewonk alternative.
basis.target_market: Discipline-first retail traders (day-trader leaning), specifically those who want post-session improvement via rule-adherence over real-time dashboards. Stocks, options, futures, forex.
basis.pricing_model: Freemium. Free tier (1 account, 1 CSV import, 50MB storage). Essential $19/mo billed annually ($228/yr): unlimited imports, 1GB storage, up to 3 strategies, advanced analytics, trade replay. Pro $49/mo: unlimited everything, voice notes, priority support.

ai_features.feature_name: AI-powered trading journal (discipline/compliance-AI focus, no marketed product name)
ai_features.ai_scope: Per-trade (each trade scored against rule criteria), per-playbook (compliance percentage per strategy), per-period (P&L lost to emotions over time).
ai_features.ai_proactive_vs_reactive: Mostly reactive/structured-scoring with some proactive surfacing of emotion/compliance correlations. Less conversational AI than TradeJournal.AI or Cypher; more 'AI-augmented scoring engine'. [uncertain on specific push channels]
ai_features.ai_minimum_trade_threshold: Not disclosed; emotion-vs-P&L analysis becomes more meaningful at higher trade counts [uncertain].
ai_features.ai_underlying_tech: Not publicly disclosed. Marketed as 'AI-powered' but the underlying model/approach (LLM vs classical ML) is not named. [uncertain]
ai_features.output_format: Compliance percentage scores per trade/strategy, emotion-tagged P&L filters, structured review templates, voice notes (Pro), reports broken down by time-of-day (15-min blocks), symbol, strategy, tags, R-multiples, position size.
ai_features.notable_prompts: Concrete marketed output: 'compliance percentage that separates strategy failure from execution failure' per strategy; 'how much P&L you lose to emotions and how performance differs when you follow your rules'. Emotion tag set used: FOMO, revenge, anxiety, overconfidence, boredom, fear. No conversational LLM prompt examples published [uncertain].

playbook_depth.playbook_concept_maturity: rule-adherence-scored. RizeTrade explicitly builds the playbook into a rule-checked engine: 'you build your rules into the platform, each trade gets checked against your criteria, and you get a compliance percentage.' This is the most explicit compliance-scoring framing in this batch.
playbook_depth.setup_level_ai: Yes at setup-level — playbook compliance scoring runs per strategy, and rule-adherence is reported per strategy with separate strategy-evolution tracking. The 'AI' here is more a structured scoring engine than a generative coach, but it works at the setup/strategy unit, not just per trade.
playbook_depth.rule_adherence_scoring: Yes, explicit and headlined. Quantified compliance percentage per trade and per strategy. Separates strategy-failure (rules broken) from execution-failure (rules followed, still lost). This is RizeTrade's signature feature.
playbook_depth.pre_trade_validation: Not advertised as pre-entry. Compliance is checked post-trade against pre-defined rules. [uncertain]
playbook_depth.playbook_template_library: Strategy builder is user-defined; pre-built named-setup templates (FVG, VWAP) not advertised as a shipped library [uncertain].

privacy_stack.cost_per_month_user: $0 (free tier) / $19/mo (Essential, annual) / $49/mo (Pro). AI included in plan.

crypto_fit.crypto_perp_exchange_support: Crypto perp exchange support not explicitly advertised. Broker imports named: ThinkorSwim, Webull, Interactive Brokers, TradeStation, Tradovate, E-Trade; CSV for everything else. Hyperliquid/Blofin/MEXC not listed. [uncertain]
crypto_fit.multi_asset: Stocks, options, futures, forex. Crypto not in headline asset list (CSV-only at best).
crypto_fit.partial_close_awareness: Not explicitly advertised. Strong execution-vs-strategy distinction suggests fine-grained trade modeling, but multi-TP first-class concept not confirmed [uncertain].
crypto_fit.gap_session_breakdown_per_setup: Reports break down performance by time-of-day in 15-minute blocks AND by strategy, so cohort-style 'strategy × time-block' analysis exists; not exactly the 'BOS+FVG London vs NY' framing but functionally close. [uncertain on automated session-name framing]

coaching_depth.coaching_depth_level: deep_pattern_analysis. Compliance scoring + emotion-P&L correlation + 15-min block analytics + voice notes give multi-axis causal coaching, not just summary metrics.
coaching_depth.psychology_metrics: Emotion tags: FOMO, revenge trade, anxiety, overconfidence, boredom, fear, overtrading, early exit. P&L can be filtered by emotion tag. Rule-adherence-per-strategy metric.
coaching_depth.voice_journaling: Yes — voice notes are a Pro-tier feature (only journal in this batch besides Tradingtick-roadmap to ship voice as a current paid feature).
coaching_depth.mentor_mode: Not explicitly advertised as a structured mentor-reviews-stats workflow [uncertain].

community.community_driven_ai: Discord community supports recap competitions, peer feedback, and structured sharing. Not advertised as shared-AI-templates specifically, but community accountability is intentional. [uncertain on shared-AI specifically]
community.changelog_ai_velocity: Recent challenger product; changelog/AI-feature release cadence not public [uncertain].
